'''''Vortex Wind''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. This powerful warship was part of a [[Alpha Fleet|task force]] commanded by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the latter part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in conjunction with [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]]. Along with the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']], ''Vortex Wind'' destroyed a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warship. She survived the battle.

The ship may have been named for the planet [[Vortex/Legends|Vortex]], a member world of the New Republic.

==Behind the scenes==
The exact class of the ''Vortex Wind'' is not clear. The term heavy Mon Cal cruiser is used to describe it, causing some fans to speculate that it may be a newer class of cruiser. Other fans maintain that it is just the standard variant of Mon Calamari cruiser in use at the time, like the [[MC90 Star Cruiser]] or [[Mediator-class battle cruiser|''Mediator''-class battle cruiser]]. It should also be noted that Mon Calamari cruisers have been described in the EU by many different classifications, ranging from [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] to battle cruiser.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
